subcodes.first_line: O my God! This servant is drawn to the gardens of Thy oneness, gladdened by the fragrances of Thy holiness, and illumined by Thy lights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی هذا العبد منجذب الی ریاض احدیتک مستبشر بنفحات قدسک مستضی ء من انوار
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for pilgrims, @Shrines and Holy places, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
